description: This email template is designed for non-profit organizations focusing on environmental activism, particularly those dedicated to maintaining ocean health and combating pollution. It's perfect for rallying volunteers for World Water Day or Earth Day events, urging them to participate in efforts to keep our oceans clean. The template features a dark mode design, making it easy on the eyes while conveying the gravity of the issue. It can also be used for global observances and celebrations related to environmental conservation. This template is an effective tactic for inspiring action and fostering a community of volunteers dedicated to preserving our planet.
short_description: Join the fight against pollution with our volunteer search email template. Designed for non-profit organizations, this dark mode template promotes ocean health, inspires activism, and encourages participation in global observances like Earth Day and World Water Day. Let's keep our oceans clean together.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
WORLD

DAY

Water is essential to all life on earth. Whether you're a fish swimming in it or a human drinking it, you need it to survive. Unfortunately, as pretty as this picture is, this isn't the reality for many beaches out there. This year for World Water Day we are heading to the local beach to clean up and do our part to reduce water pollution, check out more below.

Sign Up Now
 
 

This is the reality.

Volunteer with us on World Water Day

On Tuesday, March 22nd we will be taking a team to *insert beach name* to clean up litter along the beach. When the tide comes in and there is litter along the beach, that litter get's washed out and put into the ocean damaging the ecosystem and putting ocean-life at risk. The more people we have cleaning up the beach, the less polluted the ocean comes. Below are the groups we will be going on, find the one that works for you and we will see you there!

Tuesday, March 22nd

9:30 - 10:30
10:30 - 11:30
11:30 - 12:30
